project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo build orchestration
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turborepo. Run from repo root.
test_framework: vitest with describe/it/expect. Tests in src/__tests__/ directories.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/agent-runtime, 2. pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/agent-runtime, 3. pnpm turbo lint --filter=@quant/agent-runtime
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode, full network access. Node >=22. pnpm 10.28.1. No actual LLM API keys available in sandbox - tests must mock the AI engine.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs <=500 LOC. Every AI feature has bill of materials. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint.
key_patterns: Pilots extend WorkerAgent (abstract execute). AI engine is @quant/ai AIEngine class with infer() method. TypedToolRegistry holds tools with tier-based permissions. ExecutionEngine orchestrates plan steps. PlanGenerator creates plans from intent + tool list. SafetyClassifier gates actions. SpendingLimit / CostTracker enforce budgets. UndoEngine records reversible actions. TrustScore accumulates success/failure. ApprovalQueue gates high-risk actions. AgentStateMachine controls lifecycle (IDLE->PLANNING->EXECUTING->DONE/FAILED). KillSwitch halts all agents. Marketplace has publisher/installer with sandboxing. AI engine uses Vercel AI SDK with OpenAI/Anthropic providers.
directory_structure: packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/ - 12 pilot agent files. packages/agent-runtime/src/ - core runtime (worker-agent, execution-engine, typed-tool-registry, etc). packages/agent-runtime/src/marketplace/ - agent marketplace (spec, publisher, installer). packages/agent-runtime/src/workflows/ - pre-built workflows. packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/ - test files. packages/ai/ - central AI engine with providers, services.
